'''Peter Midanyl''' was one of [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl|Sena Midanyl's]] sons. He and his brother [[Dayvid Midanyl|Dayvid]] served aboard [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis's]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]], the ''[[Harrier]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
